title: edit: Even though both strategic alignment and digital transformation have attracted the attention of IS researchers, th…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: edit: Even though both strategic alignment and digital transformation have attracted the attention of IS researchers, there is a paucity of studies exploring how strategic alignment issues play a role in the digital transformation processes carried out within the healthcare sector, including hospitals (Jonathan & Kuika Watat, 2020).

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Revised: The healthcare sector, including hospitals, has attracted attention from IS researchers studying strategic alignment and digital transformation. However, there remains a lack of research exploring how strategic alignment plays a role in the digital transformation processes within this sector (Jonathan & Kuika Watat, 2020).

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: edit: Yet, strategic alignment is one of the essential prerequisites to successful digital transformation [12], [76] making it even more important than before [24], [35]. According to Heilig et al. [17] and Vial [67], finding the right fit between new digital technologies and organizational adaptations gets complex as organizations climb to the next generation of digital transformation. Thus, it is time to shed light on strategic alignment to drive the digital transformation initiatives [12], [17], [26], [28], [66,67], [76].

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Revised: Successful digital transformation relies on strategic alignment, which has been highlighted as a crucial factor [12], [76]. With the advent of the next generation of digital transformation, finding the right fit between new technologies and organizational adaptations becomes increasingly complex [17, 67]. It is now more important than ever to prioritize strategic alignment in driving digital transformation initiatives [12], [17], [26], [28], [66, 67], [76].

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: EDIT: In fact, strategic alignment is one of the essential prerequisites to successful digital transformation making it even more important than before.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Revised: Strategic alignment is a crucial prerequisite for successful digital transformation, making it even more important than ever before.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: edit: Finding the right fit between new digital technologies and organizational adaptations becomes increasingly complex as organizations climb to the next generation of digital transformation, so it is now more important than ever to prioritize strategic alignment in driving digital transformation initiatives

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Revised: As organizations move towards the next generation of digital transformation, finding the right fit between new digital technologies and organizational adaptations becomes increasingly complex. Therefore, prioritizing strategic alignment in driving digital transformation initiatives is more important than ever before.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: edit: In particular, organizations climb to the next generation of digital transformation, so finding the right fit between new digital technologies and organizational adaptations becomes increasingly complex, therefore, prioritizing strategic alignment in driving digital transformation initiatives is more important than ever before

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Revised: As organizations advance to the next generation of digital transformation, finding the appropriate fit between new digital technologies and organizational adaptations becomes more complex. Hence, prioritizing strategic alignment in driving digital transformation initiatives is crucial now more than ever before.
